name: python3-coreapi
title: python3-coreapi
summary: Python3 client library for Core API
description:
Python3 client library for Core API
Core API is a format-independent Document Object Model for representing
Web APIs.
.
It can be used to represent either Schema or Hypermedia responses, and
allows one to interact with an API at the layer of an application
interface, rather than a network interface.
.
This package provides a Python3 client for such APIs
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-coreapi because Python3 client library for Core API.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-coreapi as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-coreapi with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-coreapi --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
